rawContent:
The repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There is no Azure DevOps organization configured, and the git remote points to `github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra.git`.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`)
2. A project name
3. Optionally, a repository name

Please provide the Azure DevOps organization URL and project name where the pull requests are located.
